results.evidence: Step 6.5 in do/SKILL.md checks quality.perTaskReview config, dispatches spec-compliance + code-quality sub-reviews
Sub-review 1 requires fix before proceeding if misalignment found
Sub-review 2 blocks on CRITICAL/HIGH findings
Gate skipped when config absent or false (lines 169-170)
Team-lead detection via ls ~/.claude/teams/ — skip if entries exist
Phase 0 loads spec.md, extracts ACs with grep, adversarial framing present
Finding format table includes AC ID, Expected, Actual, Status columns
Scope creep detection step flags functionality not traceable to any AC
grill-report.json schema v1.1 includes acCompliance section with per-AC results
Phase 0 header states ALWAYS RUNS, not opt-in, positioned before Phase 1
Phase 1 in debug/SKILL.md gathers error messages, stack traces, recent changes, affected code paths
Phase 2 identifies recurring patterns, similar bugs, root cause hypotheses
Phase 3 tests hypotheses with minimal targeted experiments, captures results
Phase 4 implements verified fix with regression tests
Escalation Protocol triggers after 3 consecutive failures, stops and questions architecture
Anti-rationalization table has 9 entries (exceeds 8+ requirement)
Red flags table includes all 4 required triggers plus 4 additional ones
Iron Law step 1: run task's Test block command, capture output
Iron Law step 2: fallback to project-level test command
Iron Law step 3: failing test = task stays [ ], present failure output
Iron Law header: NO COMPLETION CLAIMS WITHOUT FRESH VERIFICATION EVIDENCE
tdd-cycle/SKILL.md has 8-entry anti-rationalization table with Excuse/Rebuttal/Why It Matters
Table contains all 3 required entries: I'll test after, This is too simple to test, Just this once
grill/SKILL.md has 6-entry anti-rationalization table
Table contains all 3 required entries: Close enough to the spec, We can fix it later, The tests pass
skills.md has sw:debug row in Quality & Testing Skills table
youtube-tutorial-script.md has Section 10.5 covering per-task gates, adversarial grill, debug skill
CHANGELOG.md has [1.0.421] entry documenting all 5 features
